title: Path Criticality SSOT
description: Schema for .claude/data/path-criticality.json — used by detect-task-mode.py for harness mode tiering (rules/80 §F).

critical.description: Glob patterns for critical paths — strict standard mode minimum (file count irrelevant).

low.description: Glob patterns for low-criticality paths — quick-fix mode eligible (combined with file count <= 3).

comments.description: Free-form documentation. Schema does not enforce keys.
